# qiniu_compute_security_groups (Data Source)

用于列举查询 Qiniu LAS Security Group 的 data source



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) 可选的限制返回数量, 最小值为1。不填或填为 null 则不限制数量全量返回
- `name_regex` (String)
- `network_type` (String) 网络类型过滤，可选 Standard, VPC, Isolated
- `region_id` (String) 可选的区域 ID 过滤字段，如果未指定则使用 provider 级别配置的 region_id
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `type` (String) 安全组类型，可选 Default 或 Custom
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID，VPC 模式按 VPC 过滤，标准网络（Standard / Isolated）模式留空

### Read-Only

- `security_groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_groups))

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) 一个可被解析为持续时间的字符串（参考 time.ParseDuration 文档），由数字和单位后缀组成，例如 "30s" 或 "2h45m"。有效的时间单位包括："s"（秒） "m"（分钟） "h"（小时）。读取操作发生在任何刷新或计划操作期间，当启用刷新时。


<a id="nestedatt--security_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_groups`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `network_type` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
- `rules` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_groups--rules))
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--security_groups--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security_groups.rules`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `dest_cidr_ip` (String)
- `dest_group_id` (String)
- `direction` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip_protocol` (String)
- `port_range` (String)
- `security_group_id` (String)
- `source_cidr_ip` (String)
- `source_group_id` (String)
